checks.detail:
STEP 3 OF 4
Review and sign.

Please review the key terms, then enter your legal name as your electronic signature.

Arbor Vista Retreat rental agreement

By submitting this request, you acknowledge the property rules, the guest count approved by the Host, no-smoking and no-pet policies, check-in at 4:00 PM, check-out by 10:00 AM, and responsibility for damage or extraordinary cleaning. Requests for seven or eight guests require written Host approval and confirmed sofa-bed availability.

The complete agreement includes cancellation, payment, occupancy, amenity-use, wildlife-safety, liability, dispute-resolution, and fee-schedule provisions.
